overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking along an industrial street in Night City during golden hour. The scene features futuristic industrial architecture with large spherical tanks, metal scaffolding, and passing hover vehicles, bathed in warm orange sunset light with atmospheric haze from distant smokestacks.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial street with spherical storage tanks

events.description: player character overtakes a pedestrian wearing a tan jacket and shorts

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the industrial sidewalk, approaching a pedestrian ahead

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in tan jacket walking ahead in the same direction, later overtaken

entered.detail: large metallic spherical storage tanks with pipe connections, iconic industrial structures
multi-story industrial building with metal scaffolding and corrugated panels
network of pipes and metal beams spanning across the street

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a futuristic industrial street bathed in golden hour light. Large spherical storage tanks dominate the left side while a metal warehouse structure lines the right. The character walks forward along the concrete sidewalk, overtaking a pedestrian in a tan jacket while futuristic vehicles pass on the road to the left.

events.description: road construction barriers with red and white stripes appear on the left side
character catches up to and begins walking alongside a pedestrian in a bright yellow jacket

agents.ego_description: walking past construction barriers and catching up to a pedestrian in a distinctive yellow jacket

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in bright yellow jacket walking ahead, then alongside the player

entered.detail: red and white striped construction barriers lining the edge of the road
yellow industrial traffic sign suspended over the street

segments.scene_description: The character continues down the industrial corridor, passing red and white construction barriers that line the left side of the road. The spherical tanks recede into the distance as the character catches up to and walks alongside a pedestrian wearing a bright yellow jacket. Industrial smokestacks become visible in the far distance ahead.

events.description: large digital billboard displaying 'DYNALAR' becomes visible on the right building facade
character overtakes and passes the pedestrian in the yellow jacket

agents.ego_description: overtaking the yellow-jacketed pedestrian and continuing toward the industrial smokestacks

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in yellow jacket being overtaken and falling behind
pedestrian walking toward the camera in the opposite direction

entered.detail: large illuminated digital advertisement screen displaying 'DYNALAR' on the building facade
tall industrial chimneys emitting dark smoke into the orange sky

segments.scene_description: In the final segment, the character overtakes the pedestrian in the yellow jacket as a large digital billboard for 'DYNALAR' comes into view on the right. The industrial smokestacks ahead become more prominent, emitting dark smoke against the golden sky. The character continues walking past opposing pedestrians as the spherical tanks fade from view behind.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward movement along a futuristic industrial street that transitions from a corridor of massive storage tanks toward a skyline of smoking industrial stacks. It begins on a concrete sidewalk bathed in golden hour light, moving past large spherical tanks and a metal warehouse while overtaking a pedestrian in a tan jacket. As the camera progresses, the spherical tanks recede and the path is lined with red and white construction barriers, leading the character to walk alongside a pedestrian in a bright yellow jacket. The scene then opens up to reveal a large digital billboard for Dynalar on the right, while the distant smokestacks become more prominent against the orange sky. Finally, the character overtakes the yellow-jacketed pedestrian and passes other oncoming walkers as the initial industrial tanks fade completely from view.
